name: Brian Schatz
stanceSummary: Schatz has increasingly criticized Israeli war conduct in Gaza, including public warnings about starvation and civilian harm, while also participating in Senate discussions over U.S. policy leverage. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Schatz criticized Prime Minister Netanyahu's congressional address as partisan amid unresolved ceasefire and hostage issues.
Schatz denounced starvation in Gaza and criticized Israeli government war conduct and aid restrictions.
